message:
refactor(interactive): move build_conversation_content to view submodule

Continue the interactive.rs decomposition by extracting
build_conversation_content() — the method that renders the full
conversation viewport (user messages, assistant markdown, thinking
blocks, tool call output, streaming indicators) — into
interactive/view.rs where all other rendering methods now live.

This removes another ~130 lines from the monolithic interactive.rs and
co-locates all view-building logic. The method visibility narrows from
pub to pub(super) since it is only called within the interactive module.

Also removes the unused glamour::Renderer import from interactive.rs
(it is now only needed in view.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
